plan_review_notes: Approved the receipt-linkage slice. The scope is narrow and coherent: read executed evolution follow-up tasks, derive stable task-run identifiers and receipt locators, and emit receipt artifacts without broadening into verification-claim or promotion-decision work.

plan_review_history.notes: Revised the task from the generic scaffold into a concrete receipt-linkage slice: project executed evolution follow-up tasks back into TaskRunRef and ExecutionReceiptArtifact data using real verify/promotion receipt locators, and fail loudly on missing receipt evidence.

Approved the receipt-linkage slice. The scope is narrow and coherent: read executed evolution follow-up tasks, derive stable task-run identifiers and receipt locators, and emit receipt artifacts without broadening into verification-claim or promotion-decision work.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to receipt projection only. The implementation may read evolution follow-up source context, verify results, VERIFY.md, and optional promotion receipt files to emit TaskRunRef plus ExecutionReceiptArtifact data. It must not add promotion/invalidation decisions, verification-claim linkage, or new CLI/MCP surfaces.

normal_cases.name: An executed evolution follow-up task with verify results projects into `ExecutionReceiptArtifact` entries and `TaskRunRef` records tied to the source evolution run.
A follow-up task with a recorded promotion receipt adds that receipt as an additional execution receipt artifact without changing the derived verify task runs.

edge_cases.name: Verify-command receipt locators remain stable and task-relative even when the task directory is nested under `.planning/tasks/<task-id>/`.
Receipt linkage ignores unrelated task metadata and only reads the evolution follow-up source-context segment.

exception_cases.name: A bridged follow-up task with no verify results fails clearly instead of fabricating task-run linkage.
A task that claims to have a promotion receipt but lacks the referenced file fails with an actionable missing-receipt error.

verification_methods.target: An executed evolution follow-up task with verify results projects into ExecutionReceiptArtifact entries and TaskRunRef records tied to the source evolution run.
A follow-up task with a recorded promotion receipt adds that receipt as an additional execution receipt artifact without changing the derived verify task runs.
Verify-command receipt locators remain stable and task-relative even when the task directory is nested under .planning/tasks/<task-id>/.
Receipt linkage ignores unrelated task metadata and only reads the evolution follow-up source-context segment.
A bridged follow-up task with no verify results fails clearly instead of fabricating task-run linkage.
A task that claims to have a promotion receipt but lacks the referenced file fails with an actionable missing-receipt error.
